last_cycle_summary: Completed a second bounded Eval/Skills cycle after reading V1 planning/status files, git status, the shared V1 contract facade, Review Studio/Gate/Runtime/Backend API status, and relevant eval/skills code/tests. Added createV1EvalCaseFixture so open ReviewComment records and failed GateResult records can be bundled into a replayable local eval fixture without a private schema. The fixture excludes resolved reviews and warning gates by default, carries source review/gate IDs plus local-only limitations, and focused coverage proves any skill derived from the fixture remains approval_status candidate.

review_comment_to_eval_case.evidence: createEvalCaseFromReviewComment remains in frontend/src/aletheia/agentops/v1Contracts.ts and is covered by frontend/tests/agentops/v1Contracts.test.ts.

gate_failure_to_eval_case.evidence: createEvalCaseFromGateFailure maps GateResult records into EvalCase records with gate_id, gate_type, gate_status, affected_artifact_ids, required_action, expected_behavior, expert_feedback, and source_run_id.

eval_case_fixture.evidence: createV1EvalCaseFixture bundles open review comments and failed gates into EvalCase records, preserving source_review_comment_ids, source_gate_result_ids, source_run_id, and local_only_limitations. Warning gates are excluded unless include_warning_gates is explicitly set.

candidate_skill_generation.evidence: createSkillCandidateFromEvalCases still creates ProfessionalSkill records with approval_status candidate and source eval case IDs; focused tests cover candidates created from gate-failure and eval-fixture cases.

human_approval_inactive_by_default.evidence: No approved skill activation path was added. Candidate skills remain inactive suggestions until explicit expert/human approval updates approval_status, and existing legacy playbook mapping still requires an approved playbook identity and timestamp before activation.

local_source_index_scope.evidence: Eval/Skills can consume the local-only /aletheia/matters/:matterId/v1/source-index contract for source provenance. Supabase source listing remains unavailable and must fail closed.

blockers: Supabase V1 document/chunk/source listing remains unavailable, so eval source-index provenance is local-only.
V1 runtime persistence remains local repository-level only for eval consumers; no authenticated public persistV1RuntimeResult route or approval retry wiring exists.
Review Studio still lacks persisted review-resolution API/status semantics, so review-derived eval cases remain helper/local contract output until durable review state is wired.
No legal-rule auto-learning or legal advice generation was implemented.
next_actions: Wire Review Studio unresolved ReviewComment records into createEvalCaseFromReviewComment when a human explicitly chooses to create eval cases.
Extend createV1EvalCaseFixture with source-index document/chunk/source-link provenance once a local caller supplies the backend source-index snapshot.
Keep ProfessionalSkill records candidate-only until explicit expert approval and, where required, approved matter playbook provenance exist.
If downstream Export/Audit needs durable eval datasets, require source review, gate, evidence, audit, source-index, and run IDs before treating eval output as persisted learning state.
